title: acmispon mearnsii
intro: Acmispon mearnsii, also known as Mearns' lupine or Mearns' lupine perennial, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family (Fabaceae). The medicinal properties of Acmispon mearnsii include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a natural anti-bacterial agent. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits of easing congestion and promoting immune system function. Acmispon mearnsii can be prepared for herbal use by infusing the dried leaves or roots in hot water to make a tea, or by using the plant in tincture or capsule form.
